mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_DELETE_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITEM WHERE STATUS = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT WHERE STATUS = 'N'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER
USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_ID as userId, USER_NAME as userName, USER_ADDRESS as userAddress, USER_PHONE as userPhone, USER_ENROLL_DATE as userEnrollDate, USER_STATUS as userStatus, USER_DELETE_YN as userDeleteYn FROM MEMBER
USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY USER_NO DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{offset} AND #{limit}

SELECT USER_NO as userNo, USER_ID as userId, USER_NAME as userName, USER_ADDRESS as userAddress, USER_PHONE as userPhone, USER_EMAIL as userEmail, USER_ENROLL_DATE as userEnrollDate FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}

SELECT ITEM_NO as itemNo, ITEM_TITLE as itemTitle, START_PRICE as startPrice, CURRENT_PRICE as currentPrice, CREATE_AT as createAt, STATUS as status FROM ITEM WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY CREATE_AT DESC
SELECT BOARD_NO as boardNo, BOARD_TITLE as boardTitle, BOARD_DATE as boardDate, VIEW_COUNT as views, BOARD_DELETE as boardDelete FROM BOARD_POST WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
SELECT REPLY_NO as replyNo, BOARD_NO as boardNo, REPLY_CONTENT as replyContent, REPLY_DATE as replyDate, REPLY_DELETE as replyDelete FROM REPLY WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY REPLY_NO DESC

SELECT R.REPORT_NO as reportNo, R.TARGET_TYPE as targetType, R.TARGET_NO as targetNo, R.REPORT_CD_NO as reportCdNo, C.REPORT_CATEGORY as reportCategoryName, R.STATUS as status, R.CREATED_AT as createAt FROM REPORT R LEFT JOIN REPORT_CATEGORY C ON R.REPORT_CD_NO = C.REPORT_CATEGORY_NO WHERE R.TARGET_NO IN (SELECT BOARD_NO FROM BOARD_POST WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}) OR R.TARGET_NO IN (SELECT ITEM_NO FROM ITEM WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}) ORDER BY R.REPORT_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_SANCTION (SANCTION_NO, USER_NO, SANCTIONED_AT, SUSPEND_END_DATE) VALUES (SEQ_SANCTION_NO.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE + #{days})
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET USER_STATUS = 'Y', USER_DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}

choose.when: SELECT I.ITEM_NO AS TARGET_NO, I.ITEM_TITLE AS TARGET_TITLE, I.ITEM_CONTENT AS TARGET_CONTENT, I.STATUS AS TARGET_STATUS, M.USER_ID AS TARGET_WRITER FROM ITEM I LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON I.USER_NO = M.USER_NO WHERE I.ITEM_NO = #{targetNo}

SELECT B.BOARD_NO AS TARGET_NO, B.BOARD_TITLE AS TARGET_TITLE, B.BOARD_CONTENT AS TARGET_CONTENT, B.BOARD_DELETE AS TARGET_STATUS, M.USER_ID AS TARGET_WRITER FROM BOARD_POST B LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON B.USER_NO = M.USER_NO WHERE B.BOARD_NO = #{targetNo}

SELECT R.REPLY_NO AS TARGET_NO, '댓글 신고 내역입니다' AS TARGET_TITLE, R.REPLY_CONTENT AS TARGET_CONTENT, R.REPLY_DELETE AS TARGET_STATUS, M.USER_ID AS TARGET_WRITER FROM REPLY R LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON R.USER_NO = M.USER_NO WHERE R.REPLY_NO = #{targetNo}
choose.otherwise: SELECT 0 AS TARGET_NO, '알 수 없는 대상' AS TARGET_TITLE, '데이터를 찾을 수 없습니다.' AS TARGET_CONTENT, 'N' AS TARGET_STATUS, 'UNKNOWN' AS TARGET_WRITER FROM DUAL

mapper.select: SELECT C.REPORT_CATEGORY as categoryName, COUNT(*) as reportCount FROM REPORT R LEFT JOIN REPORT_CATEGORY C ON R.REPORT_CD_NO = C.REPORT_CATEGORY_NO WHERE R.TARGET_TYPE = #{targetType} AND R.TARGET_NO = #{targetNo} GROUP BY C.REPORT_CATEGORY
SELECT F.*, M.USER_ID, C.CATEGORY_NAME FROM FAQ F JOIN MEMBER M ON F.USER_NO = M.USER_NO JOIN FAQ_CATEGORY C ON F.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID WHERE F.FAQ_ID = #{faqId}

SELECT i.ITEM_NO, i.ITEM_TITLE, i.CURRENT_PRICE, i.STATUS, COUNT(b.BID_NO) AS BID_COUNT FROM ITEM i LEFT JOIN BID b ON i.ITEM_NO = b.ITEM_NO GROUP BY i.ITEM_NO, i.ITEM_TITLE, i.CURRENT_PRICE, i.STATUS ORDER BY i.ITEM_NO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE FAQ SET ANSWER_CONTENT = #{answerContent}, STATUS = 'DONE' WHERE FAQ_ID = #{faqId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITEM WHERE STATUS = 'N'
AND ITEM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'

SELECT B.BID_NO AS bidNo, B.ITEM_NO AS itemNo, B.USER_NO AS userNo, M.USER_ID AS userId, B.BID_PRICE AS bidPrice, B.BID_TIME AS bidTime, B.RANKING AS ranking, B.BID_IP AS bidIp FROM BID B JOIN MEMBER M ON (B.USER_NO = M.USER_NO) WHERE B.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ORDER BY B.BID_PRICE DESC, B.BID_TIME ASC
SELECT b.BID_NO, b.ITEM_NO, b.USER_NO, m.USER_ID, b.BID_PRICE, b.BID_TIME, b.RANKING, b.BID_IP FROM BID b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE b.ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ORDER BY b.BID_TIME DESC
SELECT m.user_no, m.user_id, m.user_email, COUNT(b.bid_no) AS bidCount FROM member m LEFT JOIN bid b ON m.user_no = b.user_no GROUP BY m.user_no, m.user_id, m.user_email ORDER BY bidCount DESC
SELECT b.bid_time, b.bid_price, b.ranking, b.bid_ip, i.item_title FROM bid b JOIN item i ON b.item_no = i.item_no WHERE b.user_no = #{userNo} ORDER BY b.bid_time DESC
